prompt: Sophisticated geometric monogram mark combining capital letters A and M into one unified icon. The design uses negative space cleverly so both letters are clearly readable while forming a single cohesive shape. A diamond or angular frame subtly contains the monogram. Main color: rich olive green (#556B2F). Secondary accent: warm gold (#C9A84C). Style: ultra-modern, fashion-brand quality, suitable for Instagram profile picture. Completely flat design with solid colors. No gradients whatsoever. No shadows. No 3D effects. Isolated on completely transparent background. Crisp vector-like edges. Perfectly balanced and symmetrical. Do not add any text, words, or labels around the monogram.
